name: Bacon & Liver Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken livers in a small amount of salted boiling water until barely done (5-8 minutes).
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. Rub the cooked livers and hard boiled eggs through a fine sieve or food mill.
4. Blend thoroughly with all remaining ingredients except bacon, using 1/2 teaspoon lemon juice, 1 teaspoon cognac, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper.
5. Spread the mixture evenly on the halved strips of bacon.
6. Roll up the bacon strips.
7. Secure each roll with toothpicks.
8. Grill until the bacon is crisp. Serve hot.
